## Problem

What problem would this solve for your integration or users?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior, API, documentation, or tooling change you would like.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any workarounds or alternate designs you considered.

## Environment

| Field                               | Value                                                            |
| ----------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------- |
| React Native Plaid Link SDK version | e.g. 13.0.0                                                      |
| React Native version                | e.g. 0.83.2                                                      |
| Expo SDK version                    | e.g. 55, or N/A                                                  |
| Platforms                           | iOS / Android / both                                             |
| Runtime                             | Expo development build / custom native build / bare React Native |

## Additional context

Add links, screenshots, examples, or related issues.
